stories.title: Verstappen Absent from Miami Media Day — Baby Expected with Kelly Piquet

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
BREAKING: Max Verstappen will miss Thursday's FIA press conference at Miami.

Reason: Kelly Piquet is expected to give birth to their first child imminently.

The championship leader hunt continues — without Max. 🍼 #F1 #MiamiGP

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Verstappen is No. 9 in the championship with just 12 points.

He's absent from Miami media day due to his baby's imminent arrival.

The Red Bull exit clock keeps ticking. #F1 #Verstappen #MiamiGP

article.headline: Verstappen Skips Miami Media Day as First Child with Kelly Piquet Arrives

research.facts:
Verstappen Absent from Miami Media Day
**Verified Facts:**
- Verstappen will not attend Thursday FIA press conference — confirmed absent from FIA's official list [HIGH — GPBlog, GPFans]
- Reason: expected imminent arrival of first child with partner Kelly Piquet [HIGH — GPFans]
- FIA press conference roster confirmed: Hulkenberg, Perez, Piastri (slot 1); Hadjar, Sainz, Antonelli (slot 2) [HIGH — GPBlog]
- Verstappen currently No. 9 in championship with 12 pts [HIGH — Formula1.com standings]
- Hamilton also NOT on FIA press list (initial reports; Hamilton status clarified as "attending media duties" separately) [MEDIUM — conflicting reports: some say Hamilton missing, some say attending separately]
**Note on Hamilton:** Initial GPBlog report listed both as absent; GPFans article specifically cited baby as Verstappen's reason. Hamilton's exact Thursday schedule is MEDIUM confidence — using conservative language.

stories.title: Mercedes Reveals Special Purple Nu Livery for Miami Weekend

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
PURPLE Mercedes. 🟣

Antonelli and Russell will wear THREE different purple race suits this weekend in Miami — all as part of the Nu fintech partnership.

First major special livery of 2026. Go bold or go home. #F1 #MiamiGP

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Nu x Mercedes at Miami:
🟣 Purple livery
🟣 3 custom race suit designs
🟣 House of Nu in Miami's Wynwood neighborhood

Kimi Antonelli arrives as championship leader. He'll look good doing it. #F1 #MiamiGP

stories.title: McLaren's "Entirely New MCL40" Arrives in Miami — Full Upgrade List Revealed

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
McLaren's Miami upgrade list:
✅ Front brake ducts
✅ Rear brake ducts
✅ Bodywork
✅ Floor
✅ Rear wing

Stella: "completely new car from aerodynamic standpoint."

McLaren won here in 2024 AND 2025. They're coming for it. 🧡 #F1 #MiamiGP

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
McLaren won the Miami GP in 2024 (Norris) and 2025 (Piastri).

Now they've brought their biggest upgrade of 2026.

Mercedes has won every race this year. This is where it gets interesting.

#F1 #McLaren #MiamiGP

article.headline: McLaren's "Entirely New MCL40" Is Here — And Miami Is Their Best Chance Yet

research.facts:
McLaren MCL40 Upgrade Package
**Verified Facts:**
- McLaren bringing new front brake ducts, rear brake ducts, bodywork, floor, rear wing [HIGH — Crash.net, F1 Oversteer, auto-mania]
- Andrea Stella confirmed "completely new car from aerodynamic standpoint" for Miami + Canada [HIGH — Formula1.com official, widely reproduced]
- Primary goal: improve pace. Bonus goal: make car "easier to understand" [HIGH — F1 Oversteer]
- McLaren currently shortest car on 2026 grid — smaller floor, less downforce [HIGH — F1 Oversteer]
- Norris + Piastri: simulator time during break + Nürburgring tyre test (with Mercedes) [HIGH — McLaren official, Motorsport Week]
- McLaren won Miami 2024 (Norris maiden win) and 2025 (Piastri) [HIGH — established results]
- McLaren 3rd/56pts, 79 behind Mercedes [HIGH — Formula1.com standings]

stories.title: Hamilton Faces Critical Ferrari Test at Miami — "Hard Part" Begins

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text:
Lewis Hamilton is 4th in the F1 championship with 41 points.

His Ferrari teammate Leclerc has 49.

Miami is a massive test. Ferrari brings its biggest upgrade yet. Lewis needs a result.

Brundle says he's "still very much capable" of a win. 🟡 #F1 #Hamilton #MiamiGP

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text:
Hamilton on the Shanghai podium (his only Ferrari podium so far):

"Most enjoyable race I've had in a long time."

Now he faces McLaren's biggest upgrade of 2026 at a track they've won two years straight.

Time to prove it. #F1 #Ferrari #MiamiGP

article.headline: Hamilton's Ferrari Honeymoon Is Over — Miami Is Where It Gets Real

stories.title: Sprint Weekend Viewer's Guide — Miami GP Schedule, TV Times, and What to Watch

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
MIAMI GP WEEKEND:
📅 FP1 (90 min): Fri May 1 — 1PM ET
📅 Sprint Quali: Fri May 1 — after FP1
📅 Sprint Race: Sat May 2
📅 Qualifying: Sat May 2
📅 Race: Sun May 3 — 4PM ET

New FIA power rules start THIS weekend. #F1 #MiamiGP

research.facts:
Miami Sprint Weekend Schedule
**Verified Facts:**
- FP1: Friday May 1, 90 minutes, 12:00-13:30 local time (1PM ET) [HIGH — Formula1.com, FIA official]
- Sprint Qualifying: Friday May 1 (after FP1) [HIGH — Formula1.com]
- Sprint Race: Saturday May 2 [HIGH — Formula1.com]
- Main Qualifying: Saturday May 2 [HIGH — Formula1.com]
- Race: Sunday May 3, 4PM ET [HIGH — Formula1.com, NBC Miami]
- FIA rule changes: MGU-K 250kW outside key zones, 350kW in key zones [HIGH — Motorsport.com FIA confirm]
- Low-power start detection system debuts Miami [HIGH — Sky Sports, FIA confirm]
- US coverage: ESPN/ESPN2 and Peacock [MEDIUM — multiple outlet mentions, consistent]
